name: The Mommy Club: Tanzania
overview: You’ve seen the Jozi moms. Now, meet their Tanzanian sisters. Glamorous, bossed-up, and never without their trusted nannies, these five elite moms give us an all-access pass to the highs and lows of motherhood in style. From luxe living to real-life mom drama, The Mommy Club Tanzania brings heart, sass, and serious glam to the screen.

trailers.title: Dramatically Fabulous | The Mommy Club Tanzania | Showmax Original
